wizard.tagline: Let's set everything up in 2 minutes.
wizard.hint_api_key: Your key will be encrypted and stored.
wizard.hint_passphrase: Extra protection for your API keys.
help.title: ❓ Help – Overview of all features
help.quick_desc: Book in 3 steps: idea, title, genre – done.
help.master_desc: Detailed configuration: audience, perspective, tone, length, detail level.
help.library_desc: View all saved books, read and navigate through chapters.
help.settings_desc: Adjust API key, model, AI parameters, export formats and more.
help.gen_compliance: Compliance score checks how well the book follows the original idea.
help.gen_export: After generation, export to Markdown, EPUB, PDF and more.
help.gen_fallback: Fallback models provide automatic fallbacks when rate-limits are hit.
help.provider_desc: Choose AI provider and model, enter API key.
help.ai_desc: Adjust temperature, max tokens, top-P and penalties.
help.gen_settings_desc: Control language, chapter count, pace, detail level and auto-export.
help.ui_desc: Log level, token display, cost estimate and quit confirmation.
help.advanced_desc: Request timeout, cache size and advanced options.
help.api_key_desc: API keys are encrypted and stored in secrets.enc.
help.passphrase_desc: Master passphrase adds an extra password layer to protect API keys.
help.nav_numbers: Always type a number and press Enter to choose an option.
easter_egg.42.title: 🥚  Easter Egg
easter_egg.42.body:
"42" – The ultimate answer to the question of life, the universe and everything.

– Deep Thought, after 7.5 million years of computation

🐬  Don't worry – brokus will help you write a book explaining the answer.
